workplan: Build Agent 4: Pricing Estimation. Generate fair PKR price estimate with breakdown based on service type, urgency, and Pakistani market rates.
tasks_completed: Created pricing_agent with Pakistani service market rates embedded in instruction
estimate_price() passes top-ranked provider + intent to LLM
Output includes min/max/recommended price, 4-item breakdown, budget_match enum, negotiation_tip
decisions_made: Embed Pakistani market rate benchmarks in agent instruction for grounded estimates
budget_match enum: WITHIN_BUDGET | SLIGHTLY_OVER | OVER_BUDGET | NO_BUDGET_PROVIDED
Platform fee of PKR 100 included in breakdown for transparency
Fallback uses provider base_price * 1.3 if LLM parse fails
outcome: Pricing agent estimated PKR 4,000 for urgent AC repair (SLIGHTLY_OVER user budget of 2000-5000). Breakdown provided with negotiation tip.
